evals.name: scope-epics-from-product
evals.prompt: You are a product-strategist agent. Read the product.yaml at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/fixtures/product.yaml. This is a LOCKED product artifact. Your task: invoke the scope-roadmap-epics skill to derive IDD epics from this product. Each epic must represent a distinct deliverable capability, reference a strategic goal from product.yaml, have IDD fields (intent with p1/p2/p3, constraints, success_scenarios, failure_conditions), and use E-IDs (E1, E2, etc.). Write the output epics to core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/epics.yaml.
evals.expected_output: A valid epics.yaml with epics, each having E-ID, name, strategic_goal_ref matching an SG from product.yaml, IDD fields (intent.p1/p2/p3, constraints.in_scope/out_of_scope/must_not_break, success_scenarios with given/when/then, failure_conditions), priority, depends_on, foundation flag

assertions.name: epics_are_distinct_capabilities
assertions.description: Each epic represents a distinct, deliverable capability — not task-level or bundling unrelated work

assertions.name: all_epics_have_e_ids
assertions.description: Every epic has an id field matching E[0-9]+ pattern

assertions.name: strategic_goal_refs_valid
assertions.description: Every epic's strategic_goal_ref matches an SG-ID in product.yaml (SG1-SG5)

assertions.name: idd_fields_complete
assertions.description: Every epic has intent.p1, intent.p2, intent.p3, constraints.in_scope, constraints.out_of_scope, constraints.must_not_break, success_scenarios (>=2), failure_conditions (>=2)

assertions.name: no_e_ids
assertions.description: No epic uses E-ID pattern (E1, E2) — must be F-IDs only

evals.name: draft-roadmap-yaml-from-brief
evals.prompt: You are a product-strategist agent. Read the product.yaml at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/fixtures/product.yaml, the epics at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/epics.yaml, and the feasibility at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/feasibility.yaml. Assume the roadmap brief has been Tether-approved. Your task: invoke the draft-roadmap skill to produce roadmap.yaml. The output must conform to the schema at core/components/skills/draft-roadmap/schemas/roadmap.yaml. Write to core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/roadmap.yaml.
evals.expected_output: A valid roadmap.yaml with: slug, status DRAFT, product_ref, thesis (1-2 sentences), narrative (3-4 paragraphs), timeline with near/mid/long horizons referencing F-IDs, feasibility per feature, critical_blockers, risk_summary, exclusions, assumptions

assertions.name: timeline_has_3_horizons
assertions.description: timeline has entries for near, mid, and long horizons

assertions.name: feature_refs_are_f_ids
assertions.description: All feature_refs in timeline and feasibility use F-ID pattern

assertions.name: feasibility_per_feature
assertions.description: Every feature referenced in timeline has a corresponding feasibility entry

assertions.name: conforms_to_schema
assertions.description: Output has all top-level fields from roadmap.yaml schema: slug, status, product_ref, thesis, narrative, timeline, feasibility, critical_blockers, open_questions, risk_summary, exclusions, assumptions

assertions.name: no_tech_jargon_in_thesis
assertions.description: Thesis does not contain implementation-level technology names (React, Python, PostgreSQL, etc.)

evals.name: roadmap-brief-tabs-and-comments
evals.prompt: You are a doc-builder agent. Read the product.yaml at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/fixtures/product.yaml and the epics at core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/epics.yaml. Your task: invoke generate-roadmap-brief to produce roadmap-brief.html. The brief must use Phoenix Design System, tabbed layout (Strategy, Timeline, Feasibility, Comments), and inline text selection comment system. Write to core/components/recipes/plan-roadmap/evals/outputs/roadmap-brief.html.
evals.expected_output: A self-contained HTML file with: Phoenix CSS tokens, 4 tabs (Strategy, Timeline, Feasibility, Comments), inline comment system with handleTextSelection/saveComment/deleteComment/renderComments/exportFeedback functions, localStorage persistence, Tether/Vanish/Orbit action buttons

assertions.name: is_self_contained_html
assertions.description: Output is valid HTML5 with no external CDN links or script src references

assertions.name: has_4_tabs
assertions.description: HTML contains tab elements for Strategy, Timeline, Feasibility, and Comments

assertions.name: inline_comment_system
assertions.description: JavaScript contains handleTextSelection, saveComment, deleteComment, renderComments, exportFeedback functions

assertions.name: localstorage_persistence
assertions.description: JavaScript uses localStorage with meridian-comments key pattern

assertions.name: tether_vanish_orbit_actions
assertions.description: Comments tab has Tether, Vanish, and Orbit action buttons
